settings.title: Build Your Wholesale Order.
settings.lead: Select the lines you want to stock, choose colours, and tell us your volumes. We confirm availability and your tier price in writing — no payment is taken here.
settings.moq_note: Minimum order quantities are confirmed on your quote.
settings.disclaimer: This is a request, not a paid order. Our team replies with confirmed pricing, MOQs, and payment options.
settings.success_message: Thank you — your wholesale order request was received. We will reply with a confirmed quote shortly.

settings.title: From Request
settings.lead: Your order request follows one clear workflow: submit, confirm, pay, and track.

settings.title: Submit Your Product Mix
settings.text: You've selected your lines, colours, and quantities above. We review availability and check MOQ alignment for your account.

settings.title: Receive A Confirmed Quote
settings.text: Pricing is issued in writing based on your tier and quantities. No hidden charges after confirmation.

settings.title: Complete Payment
settings.text: Pay via approved channels. Your order moves to processing only after payment is confirmed, then dispatch is scheduled.

settings.title: Track To Delivery
settings.text: You receive milestone updates through one channel from dispatch to delivery, including interstate logistics handoff.
